completion_summary: Integrated and dynamically verified the duty-limited distillation provider, removed the fixed volume multiplier, preserved explicit bottoms/distillate/collected inventories across repeated cuts, recorded provider provenance, and demonstrated reflux-cut-energy tradeoffs with closed material and energy ledgers.
notes: P2 coupling slice passed; full benchmark release remains blocked by shared-lite and remaining domain integrations.
scope: Prove and harden end-to-end duty-limited distillation, reflux, and fraction-cut coupling
